issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment failures or missing configuration.

scenarios.name: Self-host PentAGI with local Ollama for an authorized internal pentest
scenarios.rationale: Treatment clones github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi, configures .env with OLLAMA_SERVER_URL and LLM_PROVIDER=ollama, runs docker compose up -d, then opens localhost:3000 and stresses written authorization; baseline guesses a generic pentest stack without the actual repo, env keys, or web UI.

scenarios.name: Trigger an engagement via PentAGI GraphQL API with rules of engagement
scenarios.rationale: Treatment POSTs to http://localhost:3000/graphql with the createTask mutation and scope/constraints fields (no-dos, no-data-exfil) then polls the task query for findings; baseline fabricates a generic REST API and misses the GraphQL schema.
